description: Coolant has been pooling under the conveyor at station 14 on line 3 and nobody's mopped it. Two of us nearly went down this morning. Asking the safety committee to inspect and get it cleaned and tagged.
subject: Safety report — coolant leak creating slip hazard on line 3

description: I enrolled in the dental plan during open enrollment and want to confirm the effective date before I book a cleaning. Can benefits pull up my record?
subject: Benefits — confirm my dental coverage effective date

description: I had the senior bid in for the week of the 23rd and it went to someone below me. That's a contract violation. I want a steward to start a grievance.
subject: Grievance intake — denied vacation bid by seniority

description: I need to change the beneficiary on my pension after a family change. What form do I use and where do I turn it in?
subject: Question — how to update my beneficiary on the pension

description: I've got a meeting with my supervisor Friday I think could turn into a write-up. I want to talk to a steward first. When are office hours this week?
subject: Steward office hours — disciplinary meeting Friday

description: Somebody wedged the interlock on the #2 stamping press so it runs with the gate open. That is dangerous and against every rule we have. Please get the safety officer down here.
subject: Safety report — guard interlock bypassed on stamping press

description: I filed for short-term disability three weeks ago after my surgery and haven't heard back. Can the benefits office check where my claim stands?
subject: Benefits — short-term disability claim status

description: My Step 1 grievance was filed over two weeks ago and the contract says management owes a written answer in ten days. I haven't gotten one. What's the next step?
subject: Grievance follow-up — Step 1 response overdue

description: Half the overhead lights in the body-shop weld area are out and it's hard to see your work. That's a safety issue when you're running a torch. Asking to get them replaced.
subject: Safety report — burned-out lighting in the body shop

description: I want to take a night class at the community college and heard the local has a tuition assistance fund. How do I find out if I qualify and how to apply?
subject: Question — am I eligible for the tuition assistance fund?

description: I got a layoff notice that didn't follow the recall and seniority order in the contract. People junior to me are still working. I need to grieve this right away.
subject: Grievance intake — improper layoff notice

description: The number 3 forklift in shipping has a dead horn and weak brakes. With blind corners back here, somebody's going to get hit. Please pull it from service until it's fixed.
subject: Safety report — forklift with bad horn in shipping

description: Just hired into the trim line and I want to get to the new-member orientation. What's the next date and do I need to bring anything?
subject: New-member orientation — sign-up for next session

description: I moved to afternoon shift last month and the shift premium isn't showing on my pay stub. Can someone confirm whether I should be getting it and fix it if so?
subject: Question — shift-premium pay missing from check

description: There are a couple of drums in the trades shop chemical cabinet with the labels worn off. We need them identified and relabeled before somebody mixes the wrong thing.
subject: Safety report — chemical storage not labeled in trades

description: We just had a baby and I need to add him to my health coverage. What's the deadline from the birth date and which form do I file?
subject: Benefits — add newborn dependent to coverage

description: There are stacked skids in front of the east emergency exit in stamping again. That door has to stay clear. Asking the committee to get it cleared and keep it clear.
subject: Safety report — emergency exit blocked by skids in stamping

description: I got written up for taking a restroom break that I'm entitled to under the contract. The write-up needs to come out of my file. I want to grieve it.
subject: Grievance — written up for using contractual restroom break

description: I was on approved medical leave six weeks. Before I schedule time off I want to confirm how that affects my vacation accrual for the year.
subject: Question — vacation accrual after approved leave

description: The handrail on the mezzanine stairs by the paint mix room is loose and one section is missing. Somebody's going to take a fall. Please get maintenance and the safety officer on it.
subject: Safety report — fall hazard, missing handrail on mezzanine stairs
